 Inpatient Healing in Florida – Compassionate Mental Health & Trauma Treatment 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Beachway Therapy Center is a trusted inpatient treatment center in Florida, providing 24/7 personalized care for individuals facing substance use disorders, mental health challenges, or dual diagnoses. Located in West Palm Beach, our residential treatment programs combine clinical expertise, holistic therapies, and compassionate support to promote lasting recovery.
 
 
 
 Inpatient Mental Health 
 
 Inpatient Trauma Treatment 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
What Is Inpatient Treatment and When Is It Needed?
 
Inpatient treatment—also known as residential treatment—involves staying at our facility while receiving structured mental health and addiction therapy. This level of care is ideal for those needing separation from triggers, accountability, and round-the-clock support.
 
 Inpatient care may be right for you if you: 
 
 
 Are struggling with severe addiction or mental illness 

 Have experienced relapse after outpatient programs 

 Live in a high-risk or unsupportive environment 

 Have co-occurring conditions like trauma, depression, or anxiety 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Beachway’s West Palm Beach location offers a serene, medically supervised environment ideal for stabilizing mental health and achieving sobriety. 
 
Comprehensive Inpatient Mental Health and Addiction Treatment at Beachway Therapy
 
Beachway’s inpatient mental health treatment includes a holistic approach and personalized care that helps clients understand their unique struggles with mental health and addiction. The serene therapeutic setting in West Palm Beach creates a safe and relaxing environment for patients to concentrate on wellness, rehab, and therapy throughout their recovery program.
 
Beachway utilizes a blend of traditional therapy , holistic care, and specialized programs to support dual diagnoses of substance abuse and mental health disorders. Beachway’s comprehensive approach includes evidence-based therapies like Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT), and Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing (EMDR), ensuring each patient receives tailored treatment.
 
In addition to individual and group therapy, Beachway offers unique programs such as trauma-focused therapy, family support sessions, and wellness activities like yoga, art therapy, and music therapy. The facility’s dedicated staff provides 24/7 support, medical detox services, and long-term rehabilitation options, emphasizing the importance of a supportive community in achieving lasting recovery.
 
With a commitment to addressing the root causes of addiction, Beachway’s team of experts works closely with each patient to develop customized treatment plans. This approach not only fosters physical and mental healing but also empowers individuals to rebuild their lives and maintain sobriety in the long term.
 
 Explore Inpatient Treatment Programs 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
Understanding Beachway’s Florida-Based Residential Rehab Program
 
Making the decision to seek help for substance abuse, addiction, or mental health is one of the first steps to reclaiming your life. Although it might seem scary and intimidating at first, the lasting benefits of professional rehabilitation are remarkably life-changing in so many ways. If you’re struggling with an addiction to drugs or alcohol and want to be free of its grasp, the team at Beachway’s inpatient treatment center in Florida is here to help you overcome your unique challenges and obstacles.
 
Each patient at our inpatient treatment center receives a completely personalized approach to therapy, which combines traditional rehabilitation programs with holistic and compassionate care. We specialize in a wide array of services, including counseling, detoxification , dual diagnosis treatment , and holistic treatments, such as art therapy , music therapy , and recreational therapy . Located in beautiful West Palm Beach, we’re passionate about providing our patients with a safe and welcoming environment where the focus is on mental health and recovery. Together, we can defeat addiction and empower lifelong health and happiness to come.
 
 
 
 
 
An Overview of Inpatient Mental Health and Addiction Treatment
 
Inpatient treatment, or residential treatment, refers to a type of treatment or a level of care. A patient will live on-site at a facility while receiving treatment services. In a mental health or addiction treatment context, they’ll be under 24-hour supervision in a supportive environment. Inpatient treatment typically lasts days or weeks at a time. During this recovery phase, patients may receive group and individual counseling, withdrawal management treatment (Detox), and clinical support.
 
One purpose of inpatient treatment for substance abuse or mental health disorders is to allow individuals to separate themselves from triggers and environments that may be leading to symptoms or poor behaviors. Within a safe, comfortable mental health treatment program —and with the support of experienced clinical and therapeutic staff — clients can work to discover root causes for disorders or symptoms, learn and practice healthier coping mechanisms, and prepare for choosing healthier lifestyles after inpatient treatment.
 
Ultimately, inpatient treatment is not a “be-all, end-all” approach to healing for individuals with mental health or addiction disorders. Instead, it’s a foundation from which clients can build a life-long approach to wellness.
 
 
 
 
 
Beachway’s Residential Treatment Program
 
Beachway Therapy Center offers inpatient medical detox and residential treatment at our Florida therapy treatment facility . Beachway’s holistic approach to residential treatment addresses addiction and mental health issues. Our luxury amenities and campus provide a focused, supportive environment that’s free of distractions.
 
Each experience with inpatient treatment at Beachway begins with a caring and holistic intake process. Our clinical team starts with an assessment that helps us understand cultural, ethnic, and religious backgrounds. This ensures we can demonstrate cultural sensitivity and understand the unique care needs each person may have related to their background.
 
The team pays special attention to trauma and other critical triggers when developing treatment plans and uses ongoing assessments and evaluations to support best practices in mental health treatment. That includes assessments to understand levels of depression, addiction, and even social and economic needs. This information informs a holistic approach that allows us to treat the whole person.
 
By experiencing treatment at our inpatient facility, patients can avoid the temptations, stresses, and complexities that can lead to relapse. During patients’ time in our inpatient program, they can learn new tools and solutions to address and heal the issues in their lives.
 
 
 
 
 
When to Consider Inpatient Mental Health or Addiction Treatment
 
Substance abuse and addiction are serious conditions that often require close, specialized care to achieve long-lasting recovery. Inpatient care offers patients several benefits that are often not available with other at-home options, thus allowing for higher success rates and lifelong changes. If you’ve tried other ways to overcome an addiction but ended up experiencing relapse, inpatient treatment may be the right next step.
 
Some signs that inpatient addiction treatment or mental health treatment — and an immediate psychiatric evaluation — may be necessary include:
 
 
 Symptoms associated with psychosis or other severe mental health issues, such as hallucinations 

 An inability to stop risk-taking and other behavior that puts someone in serious danger 

 Thoughts of harming self or others 

 General mental health symptoms that are so bad they regularly interfere with day-to-day life 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Inpatient care may be right for you if: 
 
 
 You have a severe addiction to drugs or alcohol 

 You have struggled with substance abuse for many years 

 You have experienced little success with other rehabilitation methods 

 You have experienced relapse following a previous treatment program 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Reaching out to find out more about an inpatient treatment option sooner rather than later can help support better outcomes in the future and avoid serious complications. Waiting for mental health or addiction issues to resolve themselves — or trying to white-knuckle through them without any help — can lead to even more serious situations. For example, continuing on a path to addiction can cause havoc with a person’s body and lead to serious physical illnesses and irreversible conditions.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
Beachway’s Inpatient Treatment Options
 
Beachway’s inpatient treatment options are holistic and trauma-informed. The staff works with each individual to create a tailored approach to care and integrate therapeutic modalities, such as:
 
 
 Holistic therapy 

 Trauma-focused therapy 

 EMDR 

 Cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT) 

 Dialectical behavior therapy (DBT) 

 Recreational therapy, including art therapy 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Our inpatient therapy approaches are nuanced and depend on the needs of each person. For example, someone needing trauma-focused treatment is supported through an initial stabilization period to create a safe, secure environment where they can explore therapies and healing.
 
No matter the treatment need, the staff at Beachway think creatively and work alongside each client to support unique treatment plans. Beachway never applies copy-and-paste or cookie-cutter treatment plans to every person.
 
Our clinicians are trained in best therapeutic practices, including EMDR, CBT, and DBT. However, the most important aspect of the program is adapting treatment modalities to fit the person rather than forcing people to try to change to fit the modality.
 
This adaptive approach positions Beachway as a strong advocate, support, and treatment option for individuals facing co-occurring disorders.
 
 
 
 
 
Inpatient Treatment for Substance Abuse
 
Our approach to substance abuse treatment incorporates evidence-based and holistic therapies, and our clinicians and therapists take a client-first approach to all treatment.
 
Patients receive education about each therapy approach to ensure they understand the process and goals, and staff work to accommodate personal preferences and unique physical and mental health needs. Approaches such as EMDR, DBT, and CBT allow individuals to identify negative thought patterns, behaviors, and reactions and work on new coping skills that help them break the cycles inherent in those patterns.
 
During these sessions, Beachway staff work with clients to help them adopt and practice new skills so they can prepare for a future that’s less likely to include a relapse. Because avoiding relapse is an important goal, Beachway’s therapy treatment programs include ongoing support and a long-term thought process. Our staff helps set up aftercare and other support systems so clients don’t step out of inpatient substance abuse treatment and back into the world “cold turkey.”
 
 
 
 
 
Inpatient Treatment for Mental Health in Florida
 
The staff takes a similar approach to mental health treatment. Our team conducts numerous assessments and has multiple conversations with clients to understand their mental health needs and any co-occurring diagnoses.
 
The teams at Beachway leverage specialized therapies and interventions, including CBT and other forms of talk therapy, to help clients understand their disorder and develop healthy coping mechanisms for managing it. Trauma-informed clinicians provide holistic care, and the staff also educates patients about nutrition, exercise, and other elements that can support wellness in the future.
 
During inpatient treatment, therapists use a continuous assessment process. This lets us work with each person to create a living treatment plan and adapt approaches as needed for optimal outcomes.
 
Inpatient Treatment Advantages for Mental Health and Substance Use
 
When clients enter the inpatient treatment program at Beachway, they begin a partnership with caring, experienced staff. They’re supported 24 hours a day by a range of trained professionals and staff who work to meet their daily needs so they can focus on treatment.
 
With inpatient treatment at Beachway, you’re given access to benefits such as:
 
 
 Around-the-clock support from our on-site staff of medical professionals and counselors 

 Daily sessions and check-ins personalized for your individual needs 

 A safe environment free of the stresses or influences of the outside world 

 Unique holistic therapies, such as horseback riding, golf, yoga, fishing, and more 

 Companionship from peers who share similar struggles and goals 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Our culturally sensitive approach to treatment caters to the needs of patients with diverse backgrounds. Beachway works to ensure patients can feel comfortable and safe in the program so they can let go of stressors and focus on wellness.
 
Individualized Rehabilitation for Lasting Recovery
 
Everyone’s journey to recovery is different. In certain cases, a person may require a longer-term therapy program to fully break free of their addiction. Unfortunately, many traditional programs are centered around a general 30-day approach, which isn’t always sufficient for a complete recovery. According to the US National Institute on Drug Abuse, treatment programs of 90+ days allow for the greatest chance of success.
 
At Beachway, we offer longer-term programs designed to help patients defeat addiction for good. Our mental health programs are broken down into different phases based on the patient’s individual circumstances. Long-term rehabilitation will ideally begin with a detoxification phase, followed by inpatient care consisting of daily sessions with our experienced on-site staff of medical professionals and counselors. The length of treatment will vary from patient to patient and can range from a minimum of 90 days to as long as 2 years. Your program will be customized to your needs and will continue to adapt as you grow in your recovery.
 
Inpatient treatment can take 30 to 90 days on average, and a variety of factors impact how long treatment might take. For example, individuals coming into the program with severe physical dependency issues may need to go through medical detox before they can appropriately concentrate on other therapy approaches. Those seeking mental health treatment with trauma needs may need to be stabilized before they can focus on moving forward.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
How Inpatient Mental Health & Addiction Treatment Works
 
Residential mental health treatment provides an optimal recovery environment so our patients can focus completely on getting better. After working through the initial acute detox stage, patients can begin to participate more actively in clinical services. Each patient will be assigned a primary therapist who will work with them to develop a customized treatment plan.
 
Our therapists use each patient’s unique history to determine a treatment plan that works for them. With housing and food provided throughout the day, patients are free to focus on their recovery with the full support of a clinical team when they need it. This is an intense and shorter phase of recovery, lasting anywhere from a week to a month.
 
Our holistic therapies and 24/7 support create a positive environment for our patients, helping to decrease the chance of relapse.
 
Inpatient treatment is a commitment — but the comprehensive program helps patients who find it difficult to stay sober without 24/7 support.
 
Beachway provides resources to family members, loved ones, and patients to support effective long-term recovery efforts. That includes a family support group led by a dedicated therapist who also provides support for families during the aftercare program.
 
 
 Verify Insurance Today 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
Understanding Inpatient Rehab Costs and Treatment Duration
 
The cost of treatment is determined by the level of care and length of time in each level of care. Because of the costs associated with 24-hour care, it will cost more money than lower levels of care, such as outpatient care. At Beachway, detox is the highest level of care offered and the most expensive due to the medical care required.
 
The average length of stay for those in mental health treatment programs is 45 days, and those in substance abuse treatment programs typically stay for 30 days on average. However, this can vary substantially from person to person. Beachway’s dedication to not forcing patients into treatment boxes means the team recommends the approaches they feel are best for each situation. Some factors considered in recommending mental health treatment approaches and lengths of stay include family support, medical history, history of mental health and substance abuse disorders, employment status, history of relapse, and community support.
 
Before beginning inpatient mental health treatment , the team gathers information about insurance and conducts a verification to understand what treatment the policy will cover. The team keeps clients informed every step of the way about the cost of care and works with them to plan an extended stay, including discussing ways to manage the cost.
 
 
 Receive Inpatient Treatment at Beachway 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

FAQs: Frequently Asked Questions About Inpatient Treatment
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
How do I know if inpatient treatment is right for me?
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Inpatient treatment at Beachway is ideal for individuals struggling with severe addiction or mental health conditions, especially if outpatient care hasn’t provided the support needed. If you’ve experienced relapse, live in an environment filled with triggers, or need 24/7 supervision and a structured setting, inpatient care can provide a safe foundation for lasting recovery.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Can Beachway help with both addiction and mental health disorders?
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Yes, Beachway specializes in dual diagnosis treatment. Our programs are designed to address both substance use disorders and underlying or co-occurring mental health issues such as anxiety, PTSD, bipolar disorder, and depression. This comprehensive approach leads to more effective and long-lasting recovery.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Is the facility private and secure?
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Absolutely. Beachway Therapy Center is a fully confidential inpatient facility located in West Palm Beach, Florida. We prioritize the privacy and safety of our clients, offering resort-style accommodations and secure clinical care so individuals can focus entirely on their recovery journey.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
How long does inpatient rehab usually last?
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
The average inpatient rehab program at Beachway ranges from 30 to 90 days, depending on a client’s unique needs, progress, and history. We also offer long-term residential programs for individuals needing extended support, which may range up to a year or more. Every plan is customized for the best outcome.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
What’s the admissions process like at Beachway?
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Our admissions process is simple, confidential, and supportive. Once you reach out by phone or contact form, a dedicated admissions specialist will guide you through verifying insurance, completing an assessment, and scheduling your arrival. We’re here to answer every question and help make the transition to inpatient care smooth and compassionate.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 Our Accreditations 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Begin Your Recovery at Beachway Therapy Center 
 
 
Discover your personal journey to healing at our West Palm Beach rehab and therapy center. Call us today at 877-284-0353 or complete the contact form below, and a member of our staff will be in touch to help you get started. As a leading addiction treatment center and mental health rehab in Florida, we're here to guide you and your loved ones every step of the way. Our Florida rehab center is committed to helping you achieve lasting recovery.

By submitting a form on this site, you consent to receive calls, texts, and emails from Beachway Therapy Center.

<script type="text/javascript">
function setCookie(name, value, days){
var date = new Date();
date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days*24*60*60*1000)); 
var expires = "; expires=" + date.toGMTString();
document.cookie = name + "=" + value + expires + ";path=/";
}
function getParam(p){
var match = RegExp('[?&]' + p + '=([^&]*)').exec(window.location.search);
return match && decodeURIComponent(match[1].replace(/\+/g, ' '));
}
var gclid = getParam('gclid');
if(gclid){
var gclsrc = getParam('gclsrc');
if(!gclsrc || gclsrc.indexOf('aw') !== -1){
setCookie('gclid', gclid, 90);
}
}
</script>
<script> 
function readCookie(name) { 
var n = name + "="; 
var cookie = document.cookie.split(';'); 
for(var i=0;i < cookie.length;i++) {      
var c = cookie[i];      
while (c.charAt(0)==' '){c = c.substring(1,c.length);}      
if (c.indexOf(n) == 0){return c.substring(n.length,c.length);} 
} 
return null; 
} 
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid1') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid1').value = readCookie('gclid');

class="w-full h-full block object-cover"></noscript>
</div> <div class="container-fluid max_width_1365:px-[80px] 1366:px-[140px]"> <div class="flex flex-wrap m-0 p-0 xl:gap-80 md:gap-40 gap-30"> <div class="lg:flex-1 w-full lg:order-1"> <div class="img landscape wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-jpg.webp 1440w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-300x188.webp 300w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-1024x640.webp 1024w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-768x480.webp 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 1440px) 100vw, 1440px" alt="" class="block w-full h-full object-cover absolute top-0 left-0" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-jpg.webp" />
<noscript><img width="1440" height="900" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-jpg.webp" srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-jpg.webp 1440w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-300x188.webp 300w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-1024x640.webp 1024w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Girl_Contemplative-768x480.webp 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1440px) 100vw, 1440px" alt="" 
class="block w-full h-full object-cover absolute top-0 left-0" /></noscript>
</div> </div> <div class="lg:flex-1 w-full lg:order-2"> <div class="content content-with-title text-fonts title_blue_one general-img-content-linkblue wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Intensive outpatient programs (IOPs) provide in-depth therapeutic support in an outpatient setting. Those who require this support don’t need full-time residential care but still require structured treatment while maintaining their daily routines. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">It’s a middle ground between standard </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/outpatient/php/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">outpatient</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> and </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/inpatient/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">inpatient</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> or </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/outpatient/php/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">partial hospitalization</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> programs. Inpatient programs offer 24/7 care and monitoring in a structured environment, while outpatient programs provide much less supervision. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">IOP rehab typically integrates individual and group therapy sessions with educational and support groups. They’re typically a larger time commitment than outpatient programs and can commonly support individuals struggling with substance abuse, eating disorders, and some mental health conditions. Beachway offers an intensive outpatient program in Florida that includes access to therapy and medical check-ins based on the patient’s unique needs.</span></p> </div> </div> </div> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 xl:py-80 md:py-40 py-20 smscreen2:pt-0 content-black wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="title title_blue_one text-center mb-20 wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <h2 class="font-700 uppercase h3"> Comprehensive IOP Programs in Florida </h2> </div> <div class="content text-fonts general-img-content-linkblue wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Beachway’s IOP offers access to a range of treatments, such as evidence-based therapies and holistic approaches. People with substance abuse disorder often have </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/dual-diagnosis-treatment/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">co-occurring disorders</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> that must be managed at the same time to improve the likelihood of success. This integrated model allows for the treatment of </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/substance-abuse/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">addiction</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> and co-occurring </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">mental health</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> issues. At Beachway, patients can expect treatment options such as:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/cognitive-behavior-therapy/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Cognitive behavioral therapy</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> (CBT)</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/dialect-behavior-therapy/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Dialectical behavior therapy</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> (DBT)</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/emdr-therapy/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">EMDR therapy</span></a></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/trauma-focused-therapy/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Trauma-informed care</span></a></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">While Beachway’s outpatient IOC has less medical management than higher levels of care, it still provides personalized medical oversight to assist in the transition from more intensive levels of treatment. Over time, the goal is to reduce the need for external support by encouraging the development of healthy coping mechanisms. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">In addition to these evidence-based, holistic approaches, patients may engage in group therapies and workshops that focus on addiction and co-occurring mental health issues, including relapse prevention, emotional regulation, trauma processing, and peer support sessions.</span></p> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-general-content relative overflow-hidden lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="img-with-content_gradient-left bg-blue_two absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Top-down view of Florida rehab facility featuring pool and sports court." class="w-full h-full block object-cover opacity-20" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/content-2-scaled.jpg">
<noscript><img width="2560" height="1590" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/content-2-scaled.jpg" alt="Top-down view of Florida rehab facility featuring pool and sports court."
class="w-full h-full block object-cover  opacity-20"></noscript>
</div> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="title title_white text-center mb-20"> <h3 class="font-700 uppercase"> The Benefits of Personalized IOP Treatment at Beachway </h3> </div> <div class="content text-white content-white"> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">By tailoring treatment plans to individuals through personalized therapy sessions, Beachway adapts to patients’ evolving needs as they progress through the program. Along the way, patients are encouraged to share their challenges and progress. Because the ultimate goal of IOP is to integrate patients back into their everyday routines with a sense of independence and accountability, treatment is highly dependent on both the adaptability of the program and the patient’s willingness to work honestly with their providers.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">IOP provides several benefits to patients. Most notably, it offers flexibility in scheduling treatments to accommodate their daily routines, such as work, school, or other commitments. It bridges the gap of providing intensive support without requiring an extensive stay that could disrupt employment, enrollment, or family life. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">During recovery, patients are encouraged to participate in </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">holistic therapies</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">, such as yoga, mindfulness, and group-building activities, which create fun, meaningful recovery practices by promoting a sense of well-being and balance in life. Holistic refers to the whole body, and at Beachway, it refers to customized healing options that help not just physically and mentally but also spiritually. People are unique, and their treatment plans should be as well.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Beachway, several holistic therapies can support recovery, including </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/blog/massage-therapy-for-addiction-recovery/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">massage therapy and acupuncture</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">, as well as </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/music-therapy/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">music</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">, </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/equine-therapy/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">equine</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">, and </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/art-therapy/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">art</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> therapies. This allows individuals to tailor their treatment to their personal interests, helping them further develop their toolbox of coping techniques that will be integral to maintaining recovery after discharge from the program.</span></p> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-general-content relative overflow-hidden lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="pattern absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1 bg-white"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Soothing background image of white and gray waves." class="w-full h-full block object-cover" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/AdobeStock_318195736-scaled.jpg">
<noscript><img width="2560" height="1843" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/AdobeStock_318195736-scaled.jpg" alt="Soothing background image of white and gray waves."
class="w-full h-full block object-cover"></noscript>
</div> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="title title_blue_one text-center mb-20"> <h3 class="font-700 uppercase"> Relapse Prevention in an Intensive Outpatient Program </h3> </div> <div class="content text-fonts content-fonts"> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Relapse is always a concern for people seeking support for substance abuse. Beachway’s IOP curriculum integrates relapse prevention strategies into the treatment plan to provide patients with coping mechanisms that work for them and keep them in recovery. Part of this is creating a supportive community environment that connects patients with peers to hold each other accountable. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Beachway, patients learn healthy habits to help them cope with challenging emotional situations after they complete treatment. Developing these healthy coping mechanisms under professional guidance helps them better manage difficult situations. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">These strategies are developed in individual and group therapy sessions, which provide personalized advice, coping skills, and the support of a group. In group sessions, patients may learn more about what has helped others in the same situation. The ultimate goal of these sessions is to support patients in relapse prevention to promote sustained recovery.</span></p> </div> </div> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="title title_blue_one text-center mb-20"> <h3 class="font-700 uppercase"> Flexibility and Structure in Beachway's Florida IOP </h3> </div> <div class="content text-fonts content-fonts"> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">For some, one of the biggest roadblocks to seeking support and treatment for their substance abuse is the lack of flexibility. Not everyone can afford to take extensive time off from work or school. Parents may struggle to find childcare so they can attend intensive inpatient programs to overcome their substance abuse. However, Beachway’s IOP in West Palm Beach allows people to receive the intensive support they need with the ability to structure it around their daily responsibilities.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">By blending therapy and real-life applications, patients receive the necessary treatment and support without disrupting their daily lives. The duration and frequency of treatment are largely personalized based on the patient’s unique needs, but typically, IOP involves several sessions per week over a period of several months based on clinical recommendations. </span></p> <h4><b>Support Systems and Aftercare</b></h4> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">After discharge from IOP, aftercare remains an essential factor in maintaining sobriety and wellness. At Beachway, </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/specialty-programs/aftercare/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">alumni groups</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> and events provide ongoing support. This may include resources for family members to assist in their loved one’s recovery, including open communication with the patient’s therapist and participation in family therapy sessions.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Beachway’s </span><a href="https://www.beachway.com/contact/family-recovery-program/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">family recovery programs</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> integrate the patient’s family into the recovery process. They help family members learn how to support their loved ones and cope with the struggles they face as a result of the patient’s addiction. </span></p> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-general-content relative overflow-hidden lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="img-with-content_gradient absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Top-down view of Florida rehab facility featuring pool and sports court." class="w-full h-full block object-cover" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/content-2-scaled.jpg">
<noscript><img width="2560" height="1590" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/content-2-scaled.jpg" alt="Top-down view of Florida rehab facility featuring pool and sports court."
class="w-full h-full block object-cover"></noscript>
</div> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="title title_white text-center mb-20"> <h3 class="font-700 uppercase"> Start Your Path to Recovery With Beachway's IOP in West Palm Beach </h3> </div> <div class="content text-white content-white"> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">IOP at Beachway provides patients with intensive support to help them achieve recovery. Through specialized, compassionate care, Beachway’s Florida IOP creates a comprehensive approach and supportive environment that lends itself to long-term success. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">The first step toward healing is admitting there’s a problem that needs addressing. Beachway is committed to providing the personalized treatment and structured, empathetic care necessary to overcome addiction and co-occurring disorders through IOP programs. Reach out today to learn how Beachway can help during this difficult time.</span></p> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/contact/" class="btn-yellow">Receive Outpatient IOP Treatment at Beachway</a> </div> </div> </div> </section> </main> <footer> <div class="footer"> <div class="footer__top bg-yellow_one relative overflow-hidden m-0 lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55 z-1"> <div class="hidden sm:block absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full opacity-50 -z-1"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="pattern" class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/pattern-1.c9f782.png" />

 Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP) 
 Rehab in Florida 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 Intensive outpatient programs (IOPs) provide in-depth therapeutic support in an outpatient setting. Those who require this support don’t need full-time residential care but still require structured treatment while maintaining their daily routines. 
 
 It’s a middle ground between standard outpatient and inpatient or partial hospitalization programs. Inpatient programs offer 24/7 care and monitoring in a structured environment, while outpatient programs provide much less supervision. 
 
 IOP rehab typically integrates individual and group therapy sessions with educational and support groups. They’re typically a larger time commitment than outpatient programs and can commonly support individuals struggling with substance abuse, eating disorders, and some mental health conditions. Beachway offers an intensive outpatient program in Florida that includes access to therapy and medical check-ins based on the patient’s unique needs. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Comprehensive IOP Programs in Florida 
 
 
 
 Beachway’s IOP offers access to a range of treatments, such as evidence-based therapies and holistic approaches. People with substance abuse disorder often have co-occurring disorders that must be managed at the same time to improve the likelihood of success. This integrated model allows for the treatment of addiction and co-occurring mental health issues. At Beachway, patients can expect treatment options such as: 
 
 Cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT) 
 
 Dialectical behavior therapy (DBT) 
 
 EMDR therapy 
 
 Trauma-informed care 
 
 While Beachway’s outpatient IOC has less medical management than higher levels of care, it still provides personalized medical oversight to assist in the transition from more intensive levels of treatment. Over time, the goal is to reduce the need for external support by encouraging the development of healthy coping mechanisms. 
 
 In addition to these evidence-based, holistic approaches, patients may engage in group therapies and workshops that focus on addiction and co-occurring mental health issues, including relapse prevention, emotional regulation, trauma processing, and peer support sessions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 The Benefits of Personalized IOP Treatment at Beachway 
 
 
 
 By tailoring treatment plans to individuals through personalized therapy sessions, Beachway adapts to patients’ evolving needs as they progress through the program. Along the way, patients are encouraged to share their challenges and progress. Because the ultimate goal of IOP is to integrate patients back into their everyday routines with a sense of independence and accountability, treatment is highly dependent on both the adaptability of the program and the patient’s willingness to work honestly with their providers. 
 
 IOP provides several benefits to patients. Most notably, it offers flexibility in scheduling treatments to accommodate their daily routines, such as work, school, or other commitments. It bridges the gap of providing intensive support without requiring an extensive stay that could disrupt employment, enrollment, or family life. 
 
 During recovery, patients are encouraged to participate in holistic therapies , such as yoga, mindfulness, and group-building activities, which create fun, meaningful recovery practices by promoting a sense of well-being and balance in life. Holistic refers to the whole body, and at Beachway, it refers to customized healing options that help not just physically and mentally but also spiritually. People are unique, and their treatment plans should be as well. 
 
 At Beachway, several holistic therapies can support recovery, including massage therapy and acupuncture , as well as music , equine , and art therapies. This allows individuals to tailor their treatment to their personal interests, helping them further develop their toolbox of coping techniques that will be integral to maintaining recovery after discharge from the program. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 Relapse Prevention in an Intensive Outpatient Program 
 
 
 
 Relapse is always a concern for people seeking support for substance abuse. Beachway’s IOP curriculum integrates relapse prevention strategies into the treatment plan to provide patients with coping mechanisms that work for them and keep them in recovery. Part of this is creating a supportive community environment that connects patients with peers to hold each other accountable. 
 
 At Beachway, patients learn healthy habits to help them cope with challenging emotional situations after they complete treatment. Developing these healthy coping mechanisms under professional guidance helps them better manage difficult situations. 
 
 These strategies are developed in individual and group therapy sessions, which provide personalized advice, coping skills, and the support of a group. In group sessions, patients may learn more about what has helped others in the same situation. The ultimate goal of these sessions is to support patients in relapse prevention to promote sustained recovery. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Flexibility and Structure in Beachway's Florida IOP 
 
 
 
 For some, one of the biggest roadblocks to seeking support and treatment for their substance abuse is the lack of flexibility. Not everyone can afford to take extensive time off from work or school. Parents may struggle to find childcare so they can attend intensive inpatient programs to overcome their substance abuse. However, Beachway’s IOP in West Palm Beach allows people to receive the intensive support they need with the ability to structure it around their daily responsibilities. 
 
 By blending therapy and real-life applications, patients receive the necessary treatment and support without disrupting their daily lives. The duration and frequency of treatment are largely personalized based on the patient’s unique needs, but typically, IOP involves several sessions per week over a period of several months based on clinical recommendations. 
 
 Support Systems and Aftercare 
 
 After discharge from IOP, aftercare remains an essential factor in maintaining sobriety and wellness. At Beachway, alumni groups and events provide ongoing support. This may include resources for family members to assist in their loved one’s recovery, including open communication with the patient’s therapist and participation in family therapy sessions. 
 
 Beachway’s family recovery programs integrate the patient’s family into the recovery process. They help family members learn how to support their loved ones and cope with the struggles they face as a result of the patient’s addiction. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 Start Your Path to Recovery With Beachway's IOP in West Palm Beach 
 
 
 
 IOP at Beachway provides patients with intensive support to help them achieve recovery. Through specialized, compassionate care, Beachway’s Florida IOP creates a comprehensive approach and supportive environment that lends itself to long-term success. 
 
 The first step toward healing is admitting there’s a problem that needs addressing. Beachway is committed to providing the personalized treatment and structured, empathetic care necessary to overcome addiction and co-occurring disorders through IOP programs. Reach out today to learn how Beachway can help during this difficult time. 
 
 
 Receive Outpatient IOP Treatment at Beachway 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 Our Accreditations 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Begin Your Recovery at Beachway Therapy Center 
 
 
Discover your personal journey to healing at our West Palm Beach rehab and therapy center. Call us today at 877-284-0353 or complete the contact form below, and a member of our staff will be in touch to help you get started. As a leading addiction treatment center and mental health rehab in Florida, we're here to guide you and your loved ones every step of the way. Our Florida rehab center is committed to helping you achieve lasting recovery.

<script type="text/javascript">
function setCookie(name, value, days){
var date = new Date();
date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days*24*60*60*1000)); 
var expires = "; expires=" + date.toGMTString();
document.cookie = name + "=" + value + expires + ";path=/";
}
function getParam(p){
var match = RegExp('[?&]' + p + '=([^&]*)').exec(window.location.search);
return match && decodeURIComponent(match[1].replace(/\+/g, ' '));
}
var gclid = getParam('gclid');
if(gclid){
var gclsrc = getParam('gclsrc');
if(!gclsrc || gclsrc.indexOf('aw') !== -1){
setCookie('gclid', gclid, 90);
}
}
</script>
<script> 
function readCookie(name) { 
var n = name + "="; 
var cookie = document.cookie.split(';'); 
for(var i=0;i < cookie.length;i++) {      
var c = cookie[i];      
while (c.charAt(0)==' '){c = c.substring(1,c.length);}      
if (c.indexOf(n) == 0){return c.substring(n.length,c.length);} 
} 
return null; 
} 
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid1') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid1').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid2') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid2').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid3') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid3').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid4') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid4').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
</script>

</div> <div class="container-fluid max_width_1365:px-[80px] 1366:px-[140px]"> <div class="flex flex-wrap m-0 p-0 xl:gap-80 md:gap-40 gap-30"> <div class="lg:flex-1 w-full lg:order-2"> <div class="img landscape wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/specialty-health-and-rehab.png 1024w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/specialty-health-and-rehab-300x286.png 300w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/specialty-health-and-rehab-768x732.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" alt="Specialty Health and Rehab in West Palm Beach, Florida" class="block w-full h-full object-cover absolute top-0 left-0" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/specialty-health-and-rehab.png" />
<noscript><img width="1024" height="976" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/specialty-health-and-rehab.png" srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/specialty-health-and-rehab.png 1024w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/specialty-health-and-rehab-300x286.png 300w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/specialty-health-and-rehab-768x732.png 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" alt="Specialty Health and Rehab in West Palm Beach, Florida" 
class="block w-full h-full object-cover absolute top-0 left-0" /></noscript>
</div> </div> <div class="lg:flex-1 w-full lg:order-1"> <div class="content content-with-title text-white title_black content-list-white wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <h2><strong>Unlocking Healing Through Cultural Competence and Clinical Excellence</strong></h2> <p>Your path to recovery is as unique as your story, your heritage, and your faith. At Beachway, we believe that true healing happens when we honor all aspects of who you are: not just the symptoms you’re facing, but the cultural identity, spiritual beliefs, and life experiences that shape your worldview.</p> <p>Recovery isn’t just about overcoming addiction or trauma. It’s about reclaiming your whole self and discovering how your cultural strengths can become the foundation for lasting transformation.</p> <h2><strong>Clinical Excellence Rooted in Cultural Understanding</strong></h2> <p>Our approach combines evidence-based clinical care with deep cultural competence. Our licensed clinicians specialize in trauma, mental health, and substance use disorders, but they also understand something crucial: your cultural identity isn’t separate from your healing- it’s central to it.</p> <p>Whether you’re a veteran carrying the weight of service, someone whose faith provides meaning and direction, or a person whose ethnic heritage shapes your values and worldview, we see your cultural identity as a source of strength, not something to set aside during treatment.</p> </div> <div class="home-zigzag__content--btn mt-20 lg:text-left text-center wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.6s"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/contact/" class="btn-yellow">Schedule Your Personalized Rehab Program Today</a> </div> </div> </div> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 xl:py-80 md:py-40 py-20 smscreen2:pt-0 content-white wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="content text-white wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <p><strong>What makes our approach different:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Trauma-informed care</strong> that considers cultural trauma and intergenerational experiences</li> <li><strong>Faith-integrated treatment</strong> for those who find strength in spiritual practices</li> <li><strong>Community-based healing</strong> that honors the role of family, tribe, and cultural connection</li> <li><strong>Specialized tracks</strong> designed for specific populations and their unique needs</li> </ul> <h2><strong>The Power of Cultural Identity in Recovery</strong></h2> <p>Many traditional treatment programs ask you to leave parts of yourself at the door. We invite you to bring your whole self into the healing process. Here’s why this matters:</p> <p><strong>Your Heritage as a Resource</strong>: The values, traditions, and wisdom passed down through your family and community aren’t obstacles to overcome. They’re tools for healing. Whether it’s the resilience traditions of your ancestors, the spiritual practices that have sustained your people, or the community values that define your identity, these become active parts of your recovery.</p> <p><strong>Shared Experience and Understanding</strong>: When you’re surrounded by others who share similar backgrounds, challenges, or values, healing happens more naturally. The veteran who understands the weight of service, the person of faith who shares your spiritual language, or the community member who knows your cultural struggles: these connections create space for authentic healing.</p> <p><strong>Integration, Not Replacement</strong>: We don’t ask you to choose between your cultural identity and your recovery. Instead, we help you integrate these aspects of yourself, showing you how your heritage can support and strengthen your journey to wellness.</p> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="category-grid-wrapper iconcard-boxes relative z-1 iconcard-pattern-box-heigh md:py-[70px] py-45 lg:pt-[90px] md:pt-60 pt-55" > <div class="pattern absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1 bg-white"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Soothing background image of white and gray waves." class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/AdobeStock_318195736-scaled.jpg">

</div> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__title title_blue_one text-center pt-20"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/" class="inline-block"> <h6 class="font-bernina uppercase font-700 transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out custom__break-word">Satori; Holistic <br/>Wellness Program</h6> </a> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__desc pt-20 text-left"> <p>SATORI – Science and Transcendental Orientation for Recovery and Insight. An advanced spirituality course for individuals seeking deep insight. The word Satori in Zen Buddhism means a sudden awakening or deep insight into one’s true nature. In this program, SATORI symbolizes the meeting point of science and spirituality. We integrate neuroscience, psychology, and evidence-based recovery practices with timeless spiritual wisdom and contemplative traditions. This orientation helps participants cultivate clarity, self-awareness, and resilience while moving beyond suffering. The aim is not just recovery, but awakening to a life of freedom, balance, and purpose.</p> <p><strong>Satori Program Features:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Understand the brain’s role in addiction and healing</li> <li>Develop skills for emotional regulation and resilience</li> <li>Explore spiritual principles that foster meaning and freedom</li> <li>Experience practices that cultivate clarity, balance, and self-awareness</li> </ul> <p><strong>Clinical Approach:</strong> The goal of SATORI is not only recovery from suffering but the discovery of a deeper sense of purpose and awakening.</p> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/" class="btn-yellow">Holistic Satori Program</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="lg:w-4/12 sm:w-6/12 w-full wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out md:p-20 p-10 md:px-20 px-10 wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card__inner xl:py-28 lg:py-20 py-20 lg:px-28 px-20 bg-blue_four shadow-regularshadow rounded-10"> <div class="icon-content-card__icon"> <div class="icon-content-card__icon--box xl:h-[80px] h-[50px] xl:w-[80px] w-[50px] bg-blue_two rounded-100 m-auto flex justify-center items-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 28px) 100vw, 28px" alt="vector-icon-3" class="xl:max-w-[40px] max-w-[25px] object-contain" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/Vector-icon-3.svg" />

</div> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__title title_blue_one text-center pt-20"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/contact/family-recovery-program/" class="inline-block"> <h6 class="font-bernina uppercase font-700 transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out custom__break-word">Family Recovery and <br/>Healing Services</h6> </a> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__desc pt-20 text-left"> <p>Addiction affects entire family systems, often creating secondary trauma, enabling behaviors, and damaged relationships that require specialized intervention. Our family program addresses these systemic issues while supporting the primary patient's recovery.</p> <p><strong>Family Program Features:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive family therapy addressing addiction's impact on relationships</li> <li>Education about addiction and mental health as medical conditions</li> <li>Communication skills and boundary setting training</li> <li>Secondary trauma treatment for family members</li> <li>Al-Anon and family support group facilitation</li> <li>Couples therapy and relationship rebuilding strategies</li> </ul> <p><strong>Family Healing Approach:</strong> We recognize that families often develop unhealthy patterns around addiction and mental health. Our program helps families heal these patterns while learning how to support recovery without enabling.</p> <p><strong>Evidence-Based Benefits:</strong> Research shows that family involvement in treatment improves recovery outcomes by up to 60%, making family therapy an essential component of comprehensive care.</p> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/contact/family-recovery-program/" class="btn-yellow">Get Support with Family Recovery</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="lg:w-4/12 sm:w-6/12 w-full wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out md:p-20 p-10 md:px-20 px-10 wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card__inner xl:py-28 lg:py-20 py-20 lg:px-28 px-20 bg-blue_four shadow-regularshadow rounded-10"> <div class="icon-content-card__icon"> <div class="icon-content-card__icon--box xl:h-[80px] h-[50px] xl:w-[80px] w-[50px] bg-blue_two rounded-100 m-auto flex justify-center items-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="arrow-1-2" class="xl:max-w-[40px] max-w-[25px] object-contain" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/arrow-1.svg" />

</div> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__title title_blue_one text-center pt-20"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/specialty-programs/first-responders-trauma-program/" class="inline-block"> <h6 class="font-bernina uppercase font-700 transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out custom__break-word">First Responders Specialized Treatment Program</h6> </a> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__desc pt-20 text-left"> <p>First responders face unique challenges including occupational trauma, PTSD, high-stress environments, and cultural barriers to seeking help. Our specialized program addresses these specific needs with clinicians who understand first responder culture.</p> <p><strong>First Responder Program Features:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Treatment for occupational PTSD and traumatic stress</li> <li>Understanding of first responder culture and barriers to treatment</li> <li>Specialized groups for police, firefighters, EMS, and military personnel</li> <li>Career counseling and return-to-work planning</li> <li>Family therapy addressing the impact of first responder stress on families</li> <li>Confidential treatment protecting career and security clearances</li> </ul> <p><strong>Cultural Competence:</strong> Our staff includes former first responders and clinicians with extensive experience treating this population, ensuring cultural understanding and trust-building essential for treatment success.</p> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/specialty-programs/first-responders-trauma-program/" class="btn-yellow">Support for First Responders in Recovery</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="lg:w-4/12 sm:w-6/12 w-full wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out md:p-20 p-10 md:px-20 px-10 wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card__inner xl:py-28 lg:py-20 py-20 lg:px-28 px-20 bg-blue_four shadow-regularshadow rounded-10"> <div class="icon-content-card__icon"> <div class="icon-content-card__icon--box xl:h-[80px] h-[50px] xl:w-[80px] w-[50px] bg-blue_two rounded-100 m-auto flex justify-center items-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-2" class="xl:max-w-[40px] max-w-[25px] object-contain" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-2.svg" />
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-2.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-2" class="xl:max-w-[40px] max-w-[25px] object-contain" /></noscript>
</div> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__title title_blue_one text-center pt-20"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/trauma-focused-therapy/" class="inline-block"> <h6 class="font-bernina uppercase font-700 transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out custom__break-word">Comprehensive Trauma <br/>Recovery Program</h6> </a> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__desc pt-20 text-left"> <p>Our specialized trauma track addresses the complex relationship between trauma and addiction, recognizing that up to 90% of individuals seeking addiction treatment have trauma histories. This program provides intensive, specialized care for trauma survivors who need more than standard addiction treatment.</p> <p><strong>Trauma Program Features:</strong></p> <ul> <li>EMDR, psychodrama, and somatic therapies led by trauma specialists</li> <li>Gender-specific trauma groups for enhanced safety and healing</li> <li>Treatment for PTSD, complex trauma, childhood abuse, and sexual trauma</li> <li>Family therapy addressing secondary trauma and relationship healing</li> <li>Specialized protocols for trauma survivors in early recovery</li> <li>Integration of trauma healing with addiction recovery goals</li> </ul> <p><strong>Clinical Approach:</strong> Our trauma program uses a three-phase approach: stabilization and safety, trauma processing, and integration and reconnection. This evidence-based model ensures patients build strong foundations before processing difficult memories and experiences.</p> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/trauma-focused-therapy/" class="btn-yellow">Trauma Recovery Program</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-general-content relative overflow-hidden lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="pattern absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1 bg-white"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Soothing background image of white and gray waves." class="w-full h-full block object-cover" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/AdobeStock_318195736-scaled.jpg">

class="w-full h-full block object-cover"></noscript>
</div> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="content text-fonts content-fonts"> <h3 class="h3" style="text-transform: uppercase; font-family: jaf-bernina-sans,sans-serif; margin-bottom: 15px; font-weight: bold; text-align: left;">Comprehensive Assessment for Specialty Program Placement</h3> <p>Not everyone needs specialty care, but for those who do, proper assessment and placement are crucial for treatment success. Our clinical team conducts thorough evaluations to determine appropriate specialty care needs.</p> <h3 class="h5" style="text-transform: uppercase; font-family: jaf-bernina-sans,sans-serif; margin-bottom: 15px; font-weight: bold; text-align: left;">Detailed Clinical Assessment Process</h3> <p><strong>Assessment Components Include:</strong></p> <ul class="list-column-four list-black list-columnpart-main"> <li class="xl:justify-center xl:gap-x-80 gap-x-30 sm:gap-y-10 xl:flex-nowrap flex-wrap list-column-main lg:flex-row flex-col"> <ul><li> <span> Comprehensive trauma history and PTSD evaluation </span> </li><li> <span> Cultural, spiritual, and religious needs assessment </span> </li><li> <span> Family system assessment and involvement readiness </span> </li><li> <span> Mental health complexity and dual diagnosis identification </span> </li></ul><ul><li> <span> Previous treatment history and relapse pattern analysis </span> </li><li> <span> Specialized population considerations (first responders, military, etc.) </span> </li><li> <span> Occupational and educational background evaluation </span> </li><li> <span> Social support system and environmental factors </span> </li></ul> </li> </ul> </div> </div> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="content text-fonts content-fonts"> <p><strong>Individualized Treatment Planning:</strong> Based on assessment results, our team develops personalized treatment plans that may include one or multiple specialty tracks, ensuring each patient receives the most appropriate level and type of care.</p> <h3 class="h5" style="text-transform: uppercase; font-family: jaf-bernina-sans,sans-serif; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-top: 60px; font-weight: bold; text-align: left;">Matching Patients to Appropriate Specialty Programs</h3> <p><strong>Clinical Indicators for Specialty Care:</strong></p> <ul class="list-column-three list-black list-columnpart-main"> <li class="xl:justify-between xl:gap-x-50 gap-x-30 sm:gap-y-10 list-column-main lg:flex-row flex-col"> <ul><li> <span> <strong>Trauma Program:</strong> History of PTSD, complex trauma, childhood abuse, or sexual trauma </span> </li><li> <span> <strong>Faith-Based Program:</strong> Strong religious beliefs and desire for spiritual integration </span> </li><li> <span> <strong>Long-Term Program:</strong> Multiple treatment failures, complex dual diagnosis, or chronic relapse </span> </li></ul><ul><li> <span> <strong>Family Program:</strong> Significant family dysfunction, secondary trauma, or relationship breakdown </span> </li><li> <span> <strong>First Responder Program:</strong> Occupational trauma, PTSD from emergency service work </span> </li> </ul> </li> </ul> </div> </div> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="content text-fonts content-fonts"> <p><strong>Flexible Program Participation:</strong> Many patients benefit from combining elements of multiple specialty programs. Our flexible approach allows for individualized treatment plans that address all relevant specialty needs.</p> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-general-content relative overflow-hidden lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="img-with-content_gradient-left bg-blue_two absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Background image of ocean waves representing Florida therapy center location." class="w-full h-full block object-cover opacity-20" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/section-16-scaled-1.webp">
<noscript><img width="2560" height="1771" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/section-16-scaled-1.webp" alt="Background image of ocean waves representing Florida therapy center location."
class="w-full h-full block object-cover  opacity-20"></noscript>
</div> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="content text-white content-white"> <h2><strong>Community-Centered Healing</strong></h2> <p>Recovery thrives in community, and authentic community honors who you really are. In our culturally-focused groups, you’ll find:</p> <p><strong>Safe Spaces for Identity Exploration</strong>: Optional groups designed for specific populations provide a place to explore how your cultural background has shaped both your struggles and your strengths. These aren’t just support groups: they’re spaces for cultural reclamation and empowerment.</p> <p><strong>Storytelling as Medicine</strong>: When you share your story with others who understand your context, something powerful happens. The shame that often accompanies addiction or trauma begins to lift as you realize your struggles make sense within your cultural experience, and your resilience becomes a source of inspiration for others.</p> <p><strong>Cultural Wisdom in Action</strong>: Group discussions naturally weave together clinical insights with cultural wisdom. You might explore how your grandmother’s advice about perseverance applies to recovery, or how your military training in mission focus translates to recovery goals.</p> <p><strong>Building Your Chosen Family</strong>: For many, treatment becomes a place to build new community connections while honoring existing ones. You’ll find people who understand your journey and can walk alongside you long after treatment ends.</p> <p> </p> <h2><strong>Specialized Tracks for Unique Journeys</strong></h2> <p>We offer specialized treatment tracks designed for specific communities, each addressing unique challenges and drawing on specific cultural strengths:</p> <ul class="list-column list-white list-columnpart-main"> <li class="xl:justify-between xl:gap-x-50 gap-x-30 sm:gap-y-10 list-column-main lg:flex-row flex-col"> <ul><li> <span> Veteran and First Responder Track Designed for those who've served others, addressing service-related trauma, PTSD, moral injury, and the challenge of civilian reintegration. We honor your service while helping you heal from its costs. </span> </li><li> <span> Christian Track For those whose faith in Jesus Christ provides meaning and direction, integrating biblical principles with clinical care. Explore themes of grace, redemption, and identity in Christ as foundational to your recovery. </span> </li><li> <span> Orthodox Jewish Track Culturally sensitive care that honors Jewish traditions, observances, and values. We provide kosher meals, Rabbinic consultation, Shabbos observance, and integrate Jewish concepts of healing and community into your treatment. </span> </li></ul> </li> </ul> </div> </div> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="content text-white content-white"> <h2><strong>Cultural Rituals and Practices</strong></h2> <p>Beyond group therapy, we offer optional cultural and spiritual practices that help you reconnect with your heritage:</p> <p><strong>Sacred Practices</strong>: Whether it’s prayer, meditation, ceremony, or ritual, we create space for the spiritual practices that ground you and connect you to something larger than yourself.</p> <p><strong>Community Celebrations</strong>: Observing holidays, traditions, and meaningful dates within your cultural calendar, helping you stay connected to your roots while building new, healthy associations.</p> <p><strong>Mentorship and Elder Wisdom</strong>: Connection with others who share your background and have walked similar paths, providing guidance rooted in shared understanding and cultural wisdom.</p> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-general-content relative overflow-hidden lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="pattern absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1 bg-white"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Soothing background image of white and gray waves." class="w-full h-full block object-cover" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/AdobeStock_318195736-scaled.jpg">
<noscript><img width="2560" height="1843" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/AdobeStock_318195736-scaled.jpg" alt="Soothing background image of white and gray waves."
class="w-full h-full block object-cover"></noscript>
</div> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="content text-fonts content-fonts"> <h2><strong>How Our Specialty Tracks Work</strong></h2> <p>Our specialty tracks are thoughtfully woven into our comprehensive treatment program, creating space for cultural connection while maintaining the benefits of our diverse therapeutic community. Rather than separating clients into isolated groups, these tracks operate as <strong>enriching additions </strong>to your core treatment experience.</p> <p>You’ll participate in the full range of our clinical programming alongside clients from all backgrounds, building relationships across different communities and experiences. Within this inclusive environment, your specialty track provides dedicated time and space to connect with others who share your cultural background, faith tradition, or service experience. These focused sessions allow you to explore identity-specific themes, practice cultural or spiritual rituals, and draw strength from shared understanding, all while remaining part of our broader healing community.</p> <p>This integrated approach ensures you receive comprehensive clinical care while having access to the cultural competence and peer support that can make recovery more meaningful and sustainable. You’re not separated from others, but you do have additional resources tailored to your specific journey.</p> </div> </div> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="content text-fonts content-fonts"> <p><em>Individual results may vary. Success rates based on internal program data and follow-up surveys conducted 6-12 months post-treatment.</em></p> <h3 class="h5" style="text-transform: uppercase; font-family: jaf-bernina-sans,sans-serif; margin-bottom: 15px; font-weight: bold; text-align: left; margin-top: 60px;">Why Specialty Care Works Better</h3> <p><strong>Targeted Treatment Approaches:</strong> Specialty programs address specific risk factors and challenges that generic programs may miss, leading to more effective treatment outcomes.</p> <p><strong>Cultural Competence:</strong> Understanding the unique cultural, occupational, or spiritual context of different populations builds trust and engagement essential for recovery success.</p> <p><strong>Peer Support:</strong> Being in treatment with others who share similar experiences creates stronger peer connections and mutual understanding that supports long-term recovery.</p> <p><strong>Extended Focus:</strong> Specialty programs often allow for longer or more intensive treatment of specific issues, providing the time needed for deep healing and skill development.</p> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-general-content relative overflow-hidden lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="img-with-content_gradient-left bg-blue_two absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Background image of ocean waves representing Florida therapy center location." class="w-full h-full block object-cover opacity-20" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/section-16-scaled-1.webp">
<noscript><img width="2560" height="1771" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/section-16-scaled-1.webp" alt="Background image of ocean waves representing Florida therapy center location."
class="w-full h-full block object-cover  opacity-20"></noscript>
</div> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="content text-white content-white"> <h3><strong>Your Whole Self, Your Whole Healing</strong></h3> <p>At Beachway, we’re committed to seeing you as a complete person: not just someone with a diagnosis or a problem to fix. Your cultural identity, spiritual beliefs, family history, and life experiences all matter in your recovery journey.</p> <p>We believe that when you can bring your authentic self to treatment, when your cultural strengths are recognized and celebrated, and when you’re surrounded by community that understands your journey, healing becomes not just possible, but inevitable.</p> <p><strong>Your recovery is personal. Your treatment should be too.</strong></p> <p>Ready to begin a recovery journey that honors who you are? Connect with us to learn more about our culturally-focused specialty tracks and discover how your heritage can become your greatest asset in healing.</p> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section
